title: Services
subtitle: Connect streaming services to sync your watch history.
no_sync_yet: Connected, but no sync has run yet.
pending_device: Device paired — open the extension and click Sync now.
not_connected_extension: Not connected. Install the extension and create a device token to get started.
not_connected_bearer: Not connected. Paste a bearer token from the provider's website to connect.
synced_via_extension: Synced via the Kyomiru Chrome extension.
pending_title: Device paired — waiting for first sync
pending_body: Open the extension popup, log in to {{provider}}, then click Sync now.
manage_or_add: Manage in Settings → Devices or add another below.
create_token_hint: Create an extension token to link this device to your Kyomiru account.
new_token_desc: Copy this now — you won't be able to see it again. Paste it into the Kyomiru Chrome extension popup.
install_step1_hint: Build it from apps/extension and load it unpacked in Chrome → Extensions → Developer mode.
install_step2: Create an extension token for this device
install_step3: Open the extension popup and paste your Kyomiru URL + the token
install_step4: Log in to {{provider}}, then click Sync now in the extension
bearer_placeholder: Paste the Bearer JWT access token
bearer_hint: Sign in to the provider's website, open DevTools → Network, pick an authenticated API request, copy the value of the Authorization header (the part after Bearer) and paste it here.
connected_desc: Connected. Your credentials are stored encrypted and your data will be preserved if you disconnect.
provider_tagline_crunchyroll: Anime simulcasts. Synced from your browser via the Kyomiru Chrome extension.
provider_tagline_netflix: Movies and TV. Synced from your browser via the Kyomiru Chrome extension.
provider_tagline_prime: Prime Video catalogue. Requires a bearer token from the Prime Video web app.
